summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dipzee Phase 3 features: Market Screener, Stripe Billing, and APScheduler. All Phase 3 backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (10/10 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all new features working: Screener page with filters/refresh/results, Upgrade page with pricing cards and Stripe checkout integration. Phase 2 features (97% baseline) not re-tested per instructions.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/screener/refresh?limit=8 (returned refreshed=32 tickers)
Backend: GET /api/screener (returned 37 results sorted by score descending)
Backend: GET /api/screener?min_dividend=0.03 (filtered correctly, 13 results with dividend_yield >= 0.03)
Backend: GET /api/screener?classification=buy (filtered correctly, 5 results with classification=buy)
Backend: GET /api/screener/sectors (returned 9 sectors list)
Backend: GET /api/billing/config (configured=true, 4 packages: pro_monthly, pro_annual, investor_monthly, investor_annual)
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout with pro_monthly (returned Stripe checkout URL and session_id starting with cs_test_)
Backend: GET /api/billing/status/{session_id} (returned payment_status=unpaid, status=open for uncompleted session)
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout with invalid package_id (correctly returned 400 error)
Backend: POST /api/admin/run-daily-refresh (returned {ok: true})
Frontend: Screener nav link visible in top navigation and routes to /app/screener
Frontend: Screener page loads with title and subtitle
Frontend: Screener page has sector select filter (data-testid='screener-sector-select')
Frontend: Screener page has signal/classification select filter (data-testid='screener-signal-select')
Frontend: Screener page has 3 number inputs (min dividend, max range position, min upside)
Frontend: Screener page has Refresh universe button (data-testid='screener-refresh-button')
Frontend: Screener page displays 37 result cards (data-testid='watchlist-asset-card')
Frontend: Screener page Apply filters button works (data-testid='screener-apply-button')
Frontend: Upgrade page loads at /app/upgrade with title 'Améliorez votre forfait'
Frontend: Upgrade page has monthly/annual billing toggle (data-testid='pricing-billing-toggle')
Frontend: Upgrade page displays 3 pricing plan cards (Free, Pro, Investor)
Frontend: Upgrade page has 3 upgrade buttons (data-testid='pricing-upgrade-button')
Frontend: Clicking Pro plan upgrade button initiates Stripe checkout
Frontend: Successfully redirects to Stripe checkout URL (checkout.stripe.com)
Frontend: Stripe checkout displays correct amount (CA$12.99 for Pro monthly)
Frontend: Stripe checkout is in test/sandbox mode
